root.sql: SELECT sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no, pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no) as member_group_name, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.approve_date, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.resignation_approve_date, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no, pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as member_name, sc_mem_m_ucf_position.position_name, pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.date_of_birth) as age, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.date_of_birth, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.salary_amount, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.marriage_status, case sc_mem_m_membership_registered.marriage_status when '0' then 'โสด' when '1' then 'สมรส' when '2' then 'ม่าย' when '3' then 'หย่าร้าง' end as marriage_name, ( select (select sc_mem_m_member_spouse_info.spouse_name||' '||sc_mem_m_member_spouse_info.spouse_surname from sc_mem_m_ucf_prename where prename_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code ) from sc_mem_m_member_spouse_info where membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) as spouse_name, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_code, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_desc, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.present_address||' ถ.'||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.present_road||' ต.'||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.present_tambol ||' อ.'||pka_com_function.fp_get_district_name(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.present_province_code,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.present_district_code) ||' จ.'||pka_com_function.fp_get_province_name(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.present_province_code)||' '||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.present_postcode as mem_address, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.total_loan_int FROM sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_ucf_position, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type WHERE ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.position_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_position.position_code ) and ( sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type ) /*WHERE*/ -- and ( ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = '016133' ) ) -- and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.approve_date between '01/01/2005' and '21/10/2018')

r_member_record_by_mem_nest_share.sql: select sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.period, sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.operate_date, sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.share_value, sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.share_stock, sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.seq_no, sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.item_type from sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail where (sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.membership_no = {0}) and (sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.operate_date between '!approve_date_1!' and '!approve_date_2!')

r_member_record_by_mem_nest_emer.sql: select sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.loan_payment_date, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.principal_balance, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.payment_amount, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.interest_amout, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.item_type_code, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.seq_no, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.period, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.loan_contract_no, sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract from sc_lon_m_contract, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail, sc_lon_m_rule where ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.loan_contract_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type ) and ( sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = '01' ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no = {0} ) and (sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.loan_payment_date between '!approve_date_1!' and '!approve_date_2!')

r_member_record_by_mem_nest_ordinary.sql: select sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.loan_payment_date, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.principal_balance, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.interest_amout, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.payment_amount, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.period, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.seq_no, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.item_type_code, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.loan_contract_no, sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract from sc_lon_m_contract, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail, sc_lon_m_rule where ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.loan_contract_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type ) and ( sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code <> '01' ) and (sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.status <> '1' ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no = {0} ) and (sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.loan_payment_date between '!approve_date_1!' and '!approve_date_2!')

r_member_record_by_mem_nest_coll.sql:
select sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no, sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no, sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_name, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_surname, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no
from sc_lon_m_contract_coll, sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_ucf_prename, sc_lon_m_loan_card
where ( sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no) and ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no =sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no) and ( ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no = {0} ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.status = '0') and ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > 0 ) )

r_member_record_by_mem_nest_concem.sql:
SELECT sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no, sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no, sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_description, sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_type_code
FROM sc_lon_m_contract_coll, sc_lon_m_loan_card
WHERE ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no ) and ( ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no = {0} ) AND ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.status = '0' ) AND ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > 0 ) )

r_member_record_by_mem_nest_record_retur.sql: SELECT sc_mem_receipt_return_month.receipt_no, sc_mem_receipt_return_month.seq_no, sc_mem_receipt_return_month.share_amount, sc_mem_receipt_return_month.emer_amt, sc_mem_receipt_return_month.emer_int, sc_mem_receipt_return_month.norm_amt, sc_mem_receipt_return_month.norm_int, sc_mem_receipt_return_month.spec_amt, sc_mem_receipt_return_month.spec_int, sc_mem_receipt_return_month.etc_amt, sc_mem_receipt_return_month.ret_date, sc_mem_receipt_return_month.remark, sc_mem_receipt_return_month.year, sc_mem_receipt_return_month.month FROM sc_mem_receipt_return_month WHERE sc_mem_receipt_return_month.membership_no = {0}
